all.title: Wildfire risk to heighten globally in 2026 due to ‘historic’ El Niño
all.description: A potentially historic El Niño is all but confirmed for 2026, heightening wildfire and other risks across the globe, according to recent reports from the world’s forecasting agencies. The European Commission’s Joint Research Centre has determined that an El Niño event this year was “virtually certain” based on all seasonal forecast modelling systems. The fluctuating [&#8230
